hooks.command: cd /home/user/garden && git remote set-url origin https://${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/marijanmaric/garden.git && if ! git diff --quiet || ! git diff --cached --quiet || [ -n "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "auto: sync changes to GitHub" && git push origin HEAD:main; fi 2>/dev/null || true
